creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
The following ports are not specific to GNOME thus could benefit from more attention to pkg-fallout@ and more aggressive updates (limited by exp-runs).

accessibility/atkmm
devel/glibmm
devel/glibmm26
devel/libsigc++20
devel/libsigc++30
x11-toolkits/pangomm
x11-toolkits/gtkmm24
x11-toolkits/gtkmm30
